admin.clear: DELETE FROM admins; DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name = admins;
admin.check: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT userId FROM admins WHERE userId = ?)

post.clear: DELETE FROM posts; DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name = posts;
post.create: INSERT INTO users(username, passhash) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id;

fetch.post: SELECT userId, title, content FROM posts WHERE id = ?;
fetch.allPosts: SELECT id, title, content FROM posts;

user.clear: DELETE FROM users; DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name = users;

fetch.username: SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = ?;
fetch.info: SELECT username, passhash FROM users WHERE userId = ?;

session.clear: DELETE FROM sessions; DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name = sessions;
session.create: INSERT INTO sessions (id, userId) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id, userId, createdAt;
session.fetch: SELECT id, userId, createdAt FROM sessions WHERE id = ?;
